name: PocketBase import/export behavior
pocketBaseNote: PocketBase collection metadata can be exported as an import-ready payload, imported into a fresh app, merged into existing metadata, or used as a deleteMissing replacement snapshot.

cases.name: export payload preserves collection metadata
cases.pocketBaseNote: Metadata export should preserve collection type, schema field ids, indexes, and record rules in an import-ready shape.

cases.name: export payload imports into a fresh app
cases.pocketBaseNote: A metadata export payload should be accepted by a fresh app and recreate the exported collection options.

cases.name: merge import preserves omitted fields and records
cases.pocketBaseNote: Import without deleteMissing merges with existing metadata, preserving omitted fields and record data.

cases.name: deleteMissing import replaces missing metadata and prunes record fields
cases.pocketBaseNote: Import with deleteMissing behaves like a replacement snapshot: missing collections are removed and omitted record fields are pruned.

cases.name: array root import payload is accepted
cases.pocketBaseNote: PocketBase-style import flows may provide a root collection array; Rusty Base accepts that shape for compatibility.

cases.name: duplicate collection names are rejected before import
cases.pocketBaseNote: Duplicate collection names in a single import payload are invalid and should be rejected before applying metadata changes.
